LA.name: Grand Central Market Tasting Tour
LA.description: Guided tasting walk through DTLA's 100-year-old food hall. Sample everything from Eggslut to Wexler's Deli to Horse Thief BBQ with a local food expert narrating the city's culinary history.

LA.name: Silver Lake & Los Feliz Cocktail Crawl
LA.description: An eastside bar hop through LA's most creative neighbourhood bars — from dive bars with pool tables to craft cocktail rooms. Small group, walkable, no pretension.

LA.name: Griffith Observatory & Hollywood Sign Hike
LA.description: A private half-day with a local film historian — hike to the best Hollywood Sign viewpoints, then explore Griffith Observatory's free exhibits and the Griffith Park trails. Zero tourist-trap energy.

LA.name: Venice Beach & Abbot Kinney Street Art Walk
LA.description: Walk the length of Venice Beach boardwalk, Muscle Beach, and then cut inland to Abbot Kinney — the best street murals in LA with context from a local artist guide.

LA.name: Malibu Winery & Scenic Coast Drive
LA.description: An easy half-day trip from the city — drive PCH to Malibu's surprising wine country in the Santa Monica Mountains, taste local wines, and stop at El Matador Beach on the way back.

MX.name: CDMX Morning Tacos & Mercado Tasting Tour
MX.description: Start at a taqueria before most of the city is awake, then move through a covered mercado sampling quesillo, tlayudas, fresh juice, and tamales. Best eaten before 10am when the serious locals eat.

MX.name: Roma Norte Mezcal & Natural Wine Bar Crawl
MX.description: Hit four of Roma Norte's best mezcalerías and natural wine bars in one evening — a neighbourhood that has quietly become one of the world's great drinking destinations. Small group, walking distance between stops.

MX.name: Frida Kahlo's Coyoacán: Blue House & Neighbourhood Walk
MX.description: A private morning in Coyoacán with a local art historian — the Blue House museum, Diego Rivera's studio, the central plaza, and lunch at a neighbourhood spot tourists rarely find.

MX.name: Teotihuacán Pyramids at Sunrise
MX.description: Leave the city at 5am to reach the Pyramid of the Sun before the tour buses arrive. Walk the Avenue of the Dead in golden light with a licensed archaeologist guide. Back in the city by noon.

MX.name: Lucha Libre Night at Arena México
MX.description: Attend a live Lucha Libre match at the legendary Arena México — the Madison Square Garden of Mexican wrestling. Includes transport, front section seats, and a guide who explains the drama unfolding in the ring.

HK.name: Dim Sum Breakfast & Yum Cha with a Local
HK.description: A private early-morning yum cha session at a traditional teahouse — your guide orders everything in Cantonese and explains the etiquette, the dishes, and the ritual of pouring tea. The most Hong Kong morning possible.

HK.name: Kowloon Night Food Walk: Jordan to Temple Street
HK.description: Walk from the night market through Jordan and Yau Ma Tei stopping at roasted goose stalls, clay pot rice shops, and a classic dai pai dong. Ends with a fortune teller consultation at Temple Street.

HK.name: Lantau Island: Big Buddha, Monastery & Tai O Village
HK.description: An easy day trip by MTR and cable car to Ngong Ping — the giant Tian Tan Buddha, Po Lin Monastery's famous vegetarian lunch, and the stilt-house fishing village of Tai O. A completely different side of Hong Kong.

HK.name: Central Craft Cocktail Bar Hop with a Bartender
HK.description: Four of Central and SoHo's best bars with a working bartender as your guide — including a speakeasy entrance, the best view bar in Asia, and a hidden basement cocktail room. Starts at 7pm.

HK.name: Hong Kong Tram Ride & Aberdeen Harbour Sampan
HK.description: Ride the historic double-decker tram across Hong Kong Island, then take a traditional sampan around Aberdeen's floating village and typhoon shelter. A genuine slice of old Hong Kong that's disappearing fast.

TW.name: Taipei Night Market Tasting Crawl: Raohe & Shilin
TW.description: Hit both of Taipei's great night markets in one evening — the compact Raohe Street market for pepper pork buns and oyster vermicelli, then Shilin for the full sensory overload. A guide who eats fast and knows where the locals queue.

TW.name: Jiufen, Gold Ecological Park & Northeast Coast Day Trip
TW.description: The classic northeast day trip from Taipei — Jiufen's lantern-lit alleys, the Gold Ecological Park's mining history, and a coastal drive back along Taiwan's stunning Pacific shoreline. About 4 hours from the city.

TW.name: Private Taipei Cocktail Bar & Craft Beer Night
TW.description: Taipei has quietly become one of Asia's best cocktail cities. A private evening hitting four bars — from internationally ranked cocktail rooms to a tiny craft beer basement — with a local bartender who knows every barkeep in town.

TW.name: Beitou Hot Springs & Thermal Valley Morning
TW.description: A morning trip on the MRT to Taipei's mountain hot spring district — soak in a private onsen, walk the steaming Thermal Valley, and stop at the extraordinary Beitou Library. Back in the city by lunch.

TW.name: Dadaocheng Heritage Walk & Tea Tasting
TW.description: Taipei's 19th-century merchant quarter — baroque shophouses, century-old tea merchants, dried goods stalls, and a sitting tea ceremony in a renovated warehouse. The most atmospheric neighbourhood in the city.

SG.name: Hawker Centre Deep Dive: Maxwell, Tiong Bahru & Old Airport Road
SG.description: Singapore's greatest hits in one tasting tour — the three best hawker centres, each with a completely different character. Char kway teow, Hainanese chicken rice, laksa, and chilli crab. Eat until you can't.

SG.name: Kampong Glam, Little India & Chinatown Cultural Walk
SG.description: Walk through all three of Singapore's historic ethnic quarters in one morning — the Arab Quarter's spice traders, Little India's flower garland stalls, and Chinatown's clan associations. A city in miniature.

SG.name: Singapore Sling Masterclass & Raffles History Tour
SG.description: Learn to make the original Singapore Sling at Raffles Hotel's Long Bar, then take a private tour through the hotel's colonial history with a local historian. Includes access to areas not open to regular guests.

SG.name: Southern Islands Boat Trip: Lazarus & St John's
SG.description: A private charter to Singapore's uninhabited southern islands — pristine beaches, clear water, and the feeling of being a world away from the city skyline you can still see on the horizon. Bring a cooler.

SG.name: Gardens by the Bay Night Walk & Supertree Light Show
SG.description: The Supertree Grove's free OCBC Garden Rhapsody light show at 7:45 and 8:45pm is one of the great free spectacles in Asia. This guided evening walks the whole gardens, explains the engineering, and gets you the best spots before the crowds.
